select.name: cost_to_price_ratio
select.expr: CASE WHEN product_price_dollars > 0 THEN cost_dollars / product_price_dollars ELSE NULL END
select.description: Individual supply cost as ratio of selling price

select.name: cost_efficiency_category
select.expr: CASE WHEN cost_dollars / product_price_dollars <= 0.30 THEN 'Highly Efficient' WHEN cost_dollars / product_price_dollars <= 0.50 THEN 'Efficient' WHEN cost_dollars / product_price_dollars <= 0.70 THEN 'Moderate' ELSE 'Low Efficiency' END

select.name: perishable_risk_level
select.expr: CASE WHEN is_perishable THEN 'High Risk' ELSE 'Low Risk' END
select.description: Risk level based on perishable supplies
